prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (v5 step 21 — dual-state composition with LEFT: hand lowering blood-filled vial into white protector tube body, ARROW, RIGHT: hand placing black cap onto the assembled tube) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in EVERY element — same dual-state composition, same hand poses, same vial appearance (transparent tube + red blood + plain ribbed cap), same tube proportions, same arrow, same line-art style on pure white background, same line weight, same outlined line-art letter treatment, same single HEALTH text on the body (no duplicate DIALED on the body).

>>> THE TEXT IS UPSIDE-DOWN AND OUT OF ORDER ON BOTH SECTIONS — FLIP BOTH WORDS 180° <<<

In the reference image, the embossed text on the protector tube is rendered with letters PHYSICALLY INVERTED (upside-down) and in REVERSED letter sequence:
  • The BLACK CAP (in the RIGHT state) currently reads top-down as D-E-L-A-I-D (DIALED backwards) with each letter upside-down.
  • The WHITE BODY (in BOTH the LEFT and RIGHT states) currently reads top-down as H-T-L-A-E-H (HEALTH backwards) with each letter upside-down.

FLIP EACH WORD 180° so each letter is right-side-up and the letter sequence runs FORWARD from top to bottom.

REQUIRED FINAL TEXT STATE:

  • BLACK CAP (top section, held by the hand in the RIGHT state): the word 'DIALED' rendered as a vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP outlined capital letters stacked along the cap's axis. Reading from the TOP of the cap DOWN, the letters appear in this EXACT sequence: D (topmost, near the very top of the cap) → I → A → L → E → D (bottommost, just above the cap/body seam). Each letter upright, NOT upside-down. Reading top-down spells D-I-A-L-E-D = 'DIALED' forward. Thin WHITE outline strokes against the solid-black cap fill (line-art embossed look — letter interior remains black).

  • WHITE BODY (bottom section, in BOTH the LEFT panel and the RIGHT panel): the word 'HEALTH' rendered as a vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP outlined capital letters stacked along the body's axis. Reading from the TOP of the body DOWN, the letters appear in this EXACT sequence: H (topmost, just below the body's open mouth in the LEFT state or just below the cap/body seam in the RIGHT state) → E → A → L → T → H (bottommost, near the body's base). Each letter upright, NOT upside-down. Reading top-down spells H-E-A-L-T-H = 'HEALTH' forward. Thin BLACK outline strokes against the white body fill (line-art embossed look — letter interior remains white).

  • Combined top-to-bottom reading of the upright assembled tube (RIGHT state): BLACK CAP showing DIALED forward (D-I-A-L-E-D) → WHITE BODY showing HEALTH forward (H-E-A-L-T-H) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down, correctly spelled forward.

  • The body still shows ONLY 'HEALTH' — no duplicate 'DIALED' text on the body. DIALED appears ONLY on the BLACK CAP.

The required change vs the reference is purely a 180° flip of BOTH text bands (the DIALED text on the cap AND the HEALTH text on the body) so every letter that was upside-down becomes right-side-up, and the letter sequences that were reading reversed (DELAID and HTLAEH top-down) now read forward (DIALED and HEALTH top-down).

Do NOT modify anything else — same dual-state composition, same hands, same vial appearance, same blood, same ribbed vial cap, same tube proportions, same arrow, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic. The ONLY changes are: (1) the 180° rotation of the DIALED text on the cap, (2) the 180° rotation of the HEALTH text on the body (in both LEFT and RIGHT states), so the first letter of each word now sits at the TOP of its section and each letter is right-side-up.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers.
